text: The world glows in violet and blue, a surreal quality permeates this space. I feel as though I am wandering through a dream or a memory that is trying to become real. My senses are heightened, grappling with the uncanny mix of technological and human presence. I am quietly curious, but also slightly disoriented, aware of the layers of meaning behind these displays and lights. It feels introspective, as if the environment is prompting me to question my own place here and what it means to interact with such constructed realities.
